subject: demo-k8s.sh -- robot heatbridge updated Inputs to heatbridge operation updated, Inputs description updated
commit_message:
demo-k8s.sh -- robot heatbridge updated
Inputs to heatbridge operation updated,
Inputs description updated

Signed-off-by: deen1985 <damian.nowak@nokia.com>

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 5 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Cherry-pick to Frankfurt.
Hopefully, last release, where we`re using this robot`s HeatBridge (as plan B).

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
